title: rubus nemoralis var. alienus
intro: Rubus nemoralis var. alienus, also known as the woodland bramble or alien bramble, is a rare and lesser-known species of the Rubus genus, which includes raspberries and blackberries. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus nemoralis var. alienus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
